nl query: What are the ADRs of Sunitinib in human
termite: DRUG:Sunitinib; SPECIES:Human
decompose: drugs[filter]:"Sunitinib"; effects[question]:"ADRs"; species[filter]:"human"
translate: MATCH drugsFuzzy=["Sunitinib*"] (+salt Sunitinib Malate); MATCH species="Human"; facet:effects
aggregate: AND[ drugsFuzzy=["Sunitinib*"], species="Human" ] | facets=[effects]

nl query: At which dose neutropenia occured for suntinib in homo sapiens
termite: DRUG:Sunitinib (fuzzy on misspelled 'suntinib'); SPECIES:Human (homo sapiens); ADVERSE_EVENT:Neutropenia
decompose: effects[filter]:"neutropenia"; drugs[filter]:"suntinib"; species[filter]:"homo sapiens"; dose[question]:"At which dose"
translate: MATCH effects=[neutropenia rollup, MedDRA]; MATCH drugsFuzzy=["Sunitinib*"]; MATCH species="Human"; question:dose
aggregate: AND[ effects=[neutropenia rollup], drugsFuzzy=["Sunitinib*"], species="Human" ] | displayColumns=[dose]

nl query: Does abemaciclib cause liver disorders in rats or mice?

translate: MATCH drugsFuzzy="Abemaciclib*"; MATCH effects=[Biloma, Diabetic hepatopathy, Haemobilia, …(+10 more)]; MATCH species="Rat"; MATCH species="Mouse"
aggregate: AND[ drugsFuzzy="Abemaciclib*", effects=[Biloma, Diabetic hepatopathy, Haemobilia, …(+10 more)], OR( species="Rat", species="Mouse" ) ]

nl query: What are the drug causing neutropenia in human, at which dose, dosing regimen and route?

decompose: effects[filter]:"neutropenia"; species[filter]:"human"; drugs[question]:"drug"; dose[question]:"dose"; doseType[question]:"dosing regimen"; route[question]:"route"
translate: MATCH effects=[Agranulocytosis, Autoimmune neutropenia, Benign ethnic neutropenia, …(+5 more)]; MATCH species="Human"; question:drugs+dose+doseType+route
aggregate: AND[ effects=[Agranulocytosis, Autoimmune neutropenia, Benign ethnic neutropenia, …(+5 more)], species="Human" ] | facets=[drugs, doseType, route] | displayColumns=[drugs, dose, doseType, route]

nl query: What are the drug causing neutropenia in at least one preclinical species and Human with IV administration

aggregate: AND[ drugsFuzzy=["Kinase inhibitors"], species="Human", route="Intravenous", doseType="Repeated" ] | facets=[effects]

nl query: What are the drugs causing cardiac disorders in non clinical species with single administration in adult female

aggregate: AND[ effects=["Cardiac disorders"], isPreclinical=true, doseType="Single", ages~"adult", sex="Female" ] | facets=[drugs]
